subcodes.first_line: ...Thou hast had the intention of going out into the woods and the country for change of weather... Judas Iscariot must not be forgotten
subcodes.subjects: @role of the Covenant in preserving unity, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @firmness in the Covenant
